field.label: Allowed Clients
field.help: Allowed clients list. CIDRs, IP addresses, or ClientIDs. If configured, only these clients are allowed to use AdGuard Home. Type an entry and press Enter to add.

field.label: Disallowed Clients
field.help: Disallowed clients list. CIDRs, IP addresses, or ClientIDs. These clients are blocked from using AdGuard Home. Type an entry and press Enter to add.

field.label: Disallowed Domains
field.help: Not to be confused with filters. AdGuard Home drops DNS queries matching these domains, and these queries don't even appear in the query log. You can specify exact domain names, wildcards, or URL filter rules, e.g. "example.org", "*.example.org", or "||example.org^" correspondingly. Type an entry and press Enter to add.
